title: Samsung Galaxy New Device Deeply Integrates Gemini AI to Start a New Intelligent Era
excerpt: At the latest Samsung Unpacked event, Samsung showcased its new Galaxy devices, including foldable phones, smartwatches, and upcoming smart glasses. This launch
content_html:
At the latest Samsung Unpacked event, Samsung showcased its new Galaxy devices, including foldable phones, smartwatches, and upcoming smart glasses. This launch was not just an update to hardware but also a major software revolution, with Samsung deeply collaborating with Google's Gemini AI, integrating its intelligent features natively into the new devices.

Samsung's Galaxy Z Flip 8 has been redesigned, allowing users to easily summon the Gemini intelligent assistant by long-pressing the power button. This technology aims to help users complete daily digital tasks more efficiently, such as buying concert tickets, making reservations, or planning travel experiences. Although Google stated that Gemini AI will be compatible with over 40 apps, specific supported apps and timelines are still unclear. Additionally, users can still control the process when using Gemini, viewing progress, pausing tasks, or confirming whether the AI's execution meets expectations.

Samsung and Google jointly launched the Gemini Notebook, which will be pre-installed on the new Galaxy Z Flip 8, Galaxy Z Fold 8, and Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra. Thanks to these devices' large screens, users can more conveniently drag and drop links, photos, and documents, improving mobile work efficiency. This feature not only simplifies the user's workflow but also makes multitasking much easier.

Samsung also revealed information about its upcoming smart glasses. Developed in collaboration with Google and Qualcomm, these glasses will not have traditional displays but will provide a smart experience through cameras, speakers, and microphones. Google stated in its blog that the glasses will fully support Gemini AI and seamlessly collaborate with compatible Galaxy watches. This innovation is undoubtedly set to offer users a brand-new smart wearable experience.

content_html_zh:
在最新的 Samsung Unpacked 活动中，三星展示了其新款 Galaxy 设备，包括可折叠手机、智能手表和即将推出的智能眼镜。 此次发布不仅是硬件的更新，也是一次重大的软件革命，三星与谷歌的 Gemini AI 深度合作，将其智能功能原生集成到新设备中。

三星Galaxy Z Flip 8经过重新设计，用户可以通过长按电源按钮轻松召唤Gemini智能助手。 该技术旨在帮助用户更高效地完成日常数字任务，例如购买音乐会门票、预订或规划旅行体验。 尽管谷歌表示Gemini AI将兼容40多个应用程序，但具体支持的应用程序和时间表仍不清楚。 此外，用户在使用Gemini时仍然可以控制流程，查看进度、暂停任务或确认AI的执行是否符合预期。

三星和谷歌联合推出了Gemini笔记本，该笔记本将预装在新款Galaxy Z Flip 8、Galaxy Z Fold 8和Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra上。 得益于这些设备的大屏幕，用户可以更方便地拖放链接、照片和文档，提高移动工作效率。 此功能不仅简化了用户的工作流程，而且使多任务处理变得更加容易。

三星还透露了有关即将推出的智能眼镜的信息。 这些眼镜是与谷歌和高通合作开发的，没有传统的显示屏，但将通过摄像头、扬声器和麦克风提供智能体验。 谷歌在博客中表示，该眼镜将全面支持 Gemini AI，并与兼容的 Galaxy 手表无缝协作。 这一创新无疑将为用户带来全新的智能穿戴体验。
